ddls:
CREATE TABLE "puzzles" (
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle */,
  "puzzle_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle type (e.g., Sudoku, Sliding Puzzle) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the puzzle (e.g., 4x4, 8x8) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the puzzle (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the puzzle (e.g., initial state, goal state) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the puzzle was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the puzzle was last modified */,
  "creator_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the puzzle */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the puzzle is active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("puzzle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzles_puzzle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_type_id") REFERENCES puzzle_types ("puzzle_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzles_difficulty_level FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty_level") REFERENCES puzzle_difficulty_levels ("difficulty_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzles_size FOREIGN KEY ("size") REFERENCES puzzle_sizes ("puzzle_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_types" (
  "puzzle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle type */,
  "puzzle_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the puzzle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the puzzle type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the puzzle type was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the puzzle type was last modified */,
  "creator_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the puzzle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("puzzle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ai_agents" (
  "ai_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AI agent */,
  "ai_agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the AI agent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the AI agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the AI agent was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the AI agent was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the AI agent */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the AI agent is active or retired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ai_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle being attempted */,
  "ai_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AI agent making the attempt */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the attempt */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the attempt */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the attempt was successful */,
  "attempts_count" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made by the AI agent on this puzzle */,
  "total_solution_time" REAL /* Total time taken by the AI agent to solve the puzzle across all attempts */,
  "average_solution_time" REAL /* Average time taken by the AI agent to solve the puzzle */,
  "solution_quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the quality of the solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attempts_ai_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("ai_agent_id") REFERENCES ai_agents ("ai_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attempts_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solution_paths" (
  "solution_path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solution path */,
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attempt that resulted in this solution path */,
  "solution_path" TEXT /* Solution path taken by the AI agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the solution path was created */,
  "is_optimal" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the solution path is optimal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solution_path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solution_paths_attempt_id FOREIGN KEY ("attempt_id") REFERENCES attempts ("attempt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solution_steps" (
  "solution_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solution step */,
  "solution_path_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution path this step belongs to */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Number of this step in the solution path */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of this step */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the solution step was created */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the step is critical to the solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solution_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solution_steps_solution_path_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_path_id") REFERENCES solution_paths ("solution_path_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ai_performance" (
  "ai_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AI performance entry */,
  "ai_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AI agent */,
  "puzzle_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle type */,
  "average_solution_time" REAL /* Average time taken by the AI agent to solve puzzles of this type */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the AI agent on puzzles of this type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance entry was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance entry was last modified */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts made by the AI agent on puzzles of this type */,
  "total_solution_time" REAL /* Total time taken by the AI agent to solve puzzles of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ai_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ai_performance_ai_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("ai_agent_id") REFERENCES ai_agents ("ai_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ai_performance_puzzle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_type_id") REFERENCES puzzle_types ("puzzle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_difficulty_levels" (
  "difficulty_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "difficulty_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the difficulty level was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the difficulty level was last modified */,
  "creator_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_sizes" (
  "puzzle_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle size */,
  "puzzle_size_name" TEXT /* Name of the puzzle size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the puzzle size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the puzzle size was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the puzzle size was last modified */,
  "creator_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the puzzle size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("puzzle_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, solver) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last modified */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_puzzle_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle being solved */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the session */,
  "session_quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the quality of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_puzzle_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_puzzle_sessions_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session this attempt belongs to */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle being attempted */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the attempt */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the attempt */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the attempt was successful */,
  "attempt_quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the quality of the attempt */,
  "is_optimal_solution" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the attempt resulted in an optimal solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_attempts_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_attempts_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_puzzle_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attempt_solution_paths" (
  "solution_path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solution path */,
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attempt that resulted in this solution path */,
  "solution_path" TEXT /* Solution path taken by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the solution path was created */,
  "is_optimal" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the solution path is optimal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solution_path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attempt_solution_paths_attempt_id FOREIGN KEY ("attempt_id") REFERENCES session_attempts ("attempt_id")
)
